problem id: 710cf035
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(1) XOR SHR(6)

examples:
  00000110 -> 00001100
  11111111 -> 11111101
  01000110 -> 10001101
  00000011 -> 00000110
  00011000 -> 00110000
  11110000 -> 11100011
  00100000 -> 01000000
  10101000 -> 01010010
  11101001 -> 11010001
  01101010 -> 11010101

query: 11000000
predicted answer: 10000011
